SEARCH
Package com.example.lottery

Class Entrant

java.lang.Object
com.example.lottery.Entrant
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Entrant extends Object implements Serializable
Data model representing an entrant in an event.

Responsibilities:

  • Store entrant identity and status timestamps for all 4 states: waited-listed, invited, signed-up, cancelled.
  • Store the entrant's geolocation at the time of registration.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

      public Entrant(String entrant_name, com.google.firebase.firestore.GeoPoint location, String entrant_id, com.google.firebase.Timestamp cancelled_time, com.google.firebase.Timestamp invited_time, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registration_time)
      constructor for cancelled_collections entrants
      Parameters:
      entrant_name - entrant's name
      location - entrant's location
      entrant_id - entrant's id
      cancelled_time - entrant's cancelled time
      invited_time - entrant's invited time
      registration_time - entrant's registration time
